beds.title: Music Bed — Newport Upscale Nightclub Draft
beds.note: Current upscale electronic/lounge music direction, normalized for preview. Use this to judge whether the energy feels like affluent Newport Beach nightlife.

beds.title: Foley Bed — Recumbent Bike Machinery
beds.note: Draft mechanical layer: quiet resistance whir, pedal cadence, and small drivetrain clicks. This is preview-only and should sit under dialogue in final mix.

beds.title: Combined Bed — Music Plus Recumbent Bike Foley
beds.note: Low mix preview of the music and bike foley together, before dialogue ducking or final polish.
